MINI MINUTES: JPT Tony Young; Clerk: M. Olopernes; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff West Coast Property Management is present. Represented by George Johnson.
Attorney David Wasserman for the plaintiff.
Defendant Marcos Flota is present.
Spanish Court Interpreter Kenneth Wright is present to assist the defendant.
Attorney Robert Smith appearing for defendant in full scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of SEP-14-2015 is vacated. (501/JPT)
